description: YepCode is a platform for building and running integrations, automations, and code-based processes in managed cloud sandboxes. It lets teams expose processes as callable tools, run executions, and manage related resources like storage, variables, and schedules.
summary: YepCode exposes a REST API, a hosted MCP server at `https://cloud.yepcode.io/mcp`, and a CLI; the REST API uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials from an API Credential, while the MCP server supports either OAuth or a bearer token from the same credential bundle.
